raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California would be the first state in the nation to require state procurement contracts to certify that operations and supply chains are not contributing to tropical or boreal deforestation.",
    "Assembly Bill 416 aims to prevent ongoing forest destruction by requiring contractors to maintain No Deforestation, No Peat, No Exploitation (NDPE) policies.",
    "Tropical forests cover roughly seven percent of the Earth’s surface but harbor close to half of all species on Earth.",
    "An estimated 18 million acres of forest are lost every year, largely due to the expansion of agribusiness plantations.",
    "Tropical deforestation and related land-use changes are responsible for nearly a quarter of global carbon dioxide emissions.",
    "Boreal forests account for one-third of the world’s forested areas and are the most carbon-dense forests on Earth after mangroves.",
    "The Canadian boreal forest stores twice as much carbon as the world’s oil reserves.",
    "In North America, only 15 of 51 boreal caribou herds have sufficient habitat to survive long-term, primarily as a result of industrial logging.",
    "33 percent of boreal birds have declined in the last 50 years."
  ]
}
```
